author: Arjun Krishna
name: ArjunAutoResearch
blurb: SP-1024 9x512 KV4 with MLP_MULT=3.0 (hidden=1536), seq_len=4096, lower LRs (matrix/scalar 0.02, embed 0.03), Muon momentum 0.99, warmdown 3000 steps, int6 per-row quantization on MLP+attention with fp16 tied embedding passthrough, zstd-22 compression, and sliding window evaluation at stride=64 with 4096-token context windows.
